items.name: LV Designer Vintage Tie
items.description:
Bring sharp luxury to your fit with the Checkered LV Tie — clean, bold, and instantly recognizable. Whether you’re stepping into the boardroom or the block, this tie seals the look with flawless detail.

💎 Luxury Finish – Signature LV checkered design, built for flex
🖤 Sleek Statement – Adds instant sophistication to any avatar
⚡ Bold Presence – Perfect balance of streetwear & class
🪡 Style Tip: Works flawlessly with suits, blazers, or layered streetwear fits
